title: 名探偵のボクにお任せ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, two academy staff members are
discussing an issue in the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Staff Member A
text_block_list.text: I wonder who dumped it there...

text_block_list.name: Staff Member B
text_block_list.text:
Maybe someone got the wrong idea about where
the disposal area is.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, what's going on? Did something happen?

text_block_list.name: Staff Member A
text_block_list.text:
Someone dropped their garbage near the stress
stump yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Staff Member A
text_block_list.text:
We'd like to warn them to be more careful in the
future, but we don't even know who did it.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmm, so that's it... Okay!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'll track down this thoughtless
litterbug for you!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member B
text_block_list.text: What? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Just leave this case to Great Detective
Teio! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: First, I need to do some legwork and gather info! You there, do you have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Do you need something?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Indeed. Did you happen to see any suspicious individuals around here yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...I'm not sure what sort of make-believe game
you're playing, but no, I didn't see anyone like
that.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmm, is that so... Thank you for your cooperation!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Excuuuse me. Did you happen to see any shady characters in this area yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh... why are you talking like that?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, you see, this is precisely how a great detective acts. I've deduced it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I've got no idea what you've deduced, but I haven't seen anyone suspicious.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Is that so... I thank you for your time!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmmmm, it seems that getting to the bottom of this case is proving rather trying.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: By the by, where is that garbage now?

text_block_list.name: Staff Member A
text_block_list.text: We've got it over there. Just a second...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The staff member carries a large bag of trash over
to Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? I feel like I've seen this garbage bag before.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Aaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's right... I saw Prez when I was taking out my trash
yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I put it down for a sec... then I went to the student
council office... and I completely forgot about it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I put it down for a sec... then I went to the student
council office... and I completely forgot about it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What?! Um, no, I, uhh...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hm, hmmm, just who could the culprit be? This case is positively labyrinthine.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: However, I do sense that this culprit harbored no ill will. In fact, I'm sure she's actually a good person.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I think I'll just get rid of this garbage myself!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Sooorrryyy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio grabs the garbage and runs off at an
incredible speed.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: The truth is...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I was the culprit who left the garbage here! I'm
really sorry!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I just put it down for a moment... and I was
planning to come back right away... but I forgot
about it...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm really, really sorry!

text_block_list.name: Staff Member A
text_block_list.text:
So that's what happened... Well, I can tell that
you regret what you did, so you don't need to
apologize anymore.

text_block_list.name: Staff Member B
text_block_list.text: We know you didn't do it on purpose.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I'll try to be more careful from now on...
